decisions.decision: Phase 29: Two-layer upstream detection (rev-parse local first, ls-remote fallback)

context_notes: Running /gsd:autonomous sprint for v0.8.0 milestone (4 phases: 29-32). Phases 29-30 complete. Phase 31 Wave 1 (Plan 01) is merged to main. Phase 31 Wave 2 (Plan 02) code is in worktree-agent-a34255df — the agent re-implemented detectWorkspaceFromCwd and resolveWorkspaceArg because the worktree branched from before Plan 01 was merged. Merge will likely have conflicts on workspace-ops.ts and issue-utils.ts that need manual resolution to keep Plan 01's implementation and Plan 02's wiring additions. After Phase 31, Phase 32 (GitLab slash investigation) is the last phase, then milestone lifecycle (audit, complete, cleanup) with README/CHANGELOG prep.
